Operation 'getSamples' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too minimal and doesn't explain the purpose or use case for sample matches. Added context about what samples are used for (telemetry exploration), clarified the return format (array of IDs), and explained the operational value (discovering matches without player context). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus player-specific match queries.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of sample match IDs.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve sample match IDs for exploration
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of recent sample match IDs available for telemetry data retrieval. Returns an array of match IDs that can be used to access match telemetry and detailed match information. Useful for discovering recent matches without requiring a specific player context.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and doesn't explain the purpose or use case for sample matches. Added context about what samples are used for (telemetry exploration), clarified the return format (array of IDs), and explained the operational value (discovering matches without player context). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus player-specific match queries.

message: Operation 'getWeaponMastery' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about what weapon mastery data contains and what the response includes. Added clarity about mastery levels, weapon types, and proficiency tracking. Specified required parameters (player ID and platform) to help AI agents understand prerequisites. Enhanced domain terminology consistency with 'mastery progression' and 'proficiency'.

data.current_description: Retrieve weapon mastery data for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player weapon mastery progression
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve weapon mastery progression data for a specific player, including mastery levels and statistics for each weapon type. Returns detailed weapon mastery information showing player proficiency across different weapons. Requires the player ID and platform shard.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what weapon mastery data contains and what the response includes. Added clarity about mastery levels, weapon types, and proficiency tracking. Specified required parameters (player ID and platform) to help AI agents understand prerequisites. Enhanced domain terminology consistency with 'mastery progression' and 'proficiency'.

data.current_description: Retrieve survival mastery data for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player survival mastery progression
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve survival mastery progression data for a specific player, including mastery levels and statistics for survival-related achievements. Returns detailed survival mastery information showing player progression in survival mechanics and achievements. Requires the player ID and platform shard.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't explain what survival mastery encompasses or what data is returned. Added clarity about mastery levels, survival-related achievements, and progression tracking. Specified required parameters (player ID and platform) for AI agent clarity. Improved domain terminology consistency with 'survival mastery progression' and 'survival mechanics'.

message: Operation 'getLeaderboard' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks detail about leaderboard content, ranking criteria, and pagination support. Added clarity about what data is returned (player rankings, ratings, statistics), specified all required parameters (season ID, game mode, platform), and mentioned pagination support. Enhanced domain terminology with 'ranked leaderboard', 'competitive rating', and 'game mode'. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and how to use pagination.

data.current_description: Retrieve the leaderboard for a specific season and game mode.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve ranked leaderboard for season and mode
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the ranked leaderboard for a specific season and game mode, showing top-ranked players with their ratings and statistics. Returns a paginated list of players ranked by their competitive rating for the specified season and game mode. Requires season ID, game mode, and platform shard. Supports pagination parameters.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about leaderboard content, ranking criteria, and pagination support. Added clarity about what data is returned (player rankings, ratings, statistics), specified all required parameters (season ID, game mode, platform), and mentioned pagination support. Enhanced domain terminology with 'ranked leaderboard', 'competitive rating', and 'game mode'. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and how to use pagination.

message: Operation 'getPlayers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (filter parameter), output structure, and how to specify search criteria. Added details about batch limit, return data structure, and parameter usage for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Search for players by name or ID. Supports batch lookups of up to 10 players.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for players by name or ID
data.description_suggestion: Search for one or more players by player name or account ID. Supports batch lookups of up to 10 players per request. Returns player profile data including account ID, name, and platform information for each matched player. Use the filter parameter to specify search criteria (name or ID).
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (filter parameter), output structure, and how to specify search criteria. Added details about batch limit, return data structure, and parameter usage for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getSeasons' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks information about what season data is returned and the purpose of this operation in the context of other stat queries. Enhanced to clarify return structure and use case.

data.current_description: Retrieve the list of available seasons for a platform.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve available seasons for platform
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the list of all available seasons for the specified platform. Returns season metadata including season ID, name, and status (active/inactive). Use this to identify valid season IDs for season-specific stat queries.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks information about what season data is returned and the purpose of this operation in the context of other stat queries. Enhanced to clarify return structure and use case.

message: Operation 'getPlayerSeasonStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary lacks specificity about what 'stats' means. Description is too vague about what statistics are returned. Added context about game modes, specific metrics returned, and clarification that both ranked and casual data are included to help AI agents understand the response structure.

data.current_description: Retrieve season statistics for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player statistics for specific season
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve comprehensive season statistics for a specific player in a given season. Returns game mode statistics (solo, duo, squad) including kills, deaths, wins, top 10 finishes, and other performance metrics. Includes both ranked and casual mode data for the specified season.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about what 'stats' means. Description is too vague about what statistics are returned. Added context about game modes, specific metrics returned, and clarification that both ranked and casual data are included to help AI agents understand the response structure.

message: Operation 'getPlayerRankedStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description lack clarity on what distinguishes ranked stats from general season stats. Added explicit mention that this returns ranked-only data, excludes casual modes, and includes rank tier/points information to clarify the distinction and help AI agents choose the correct endpoint.

data.current_description: Retrieve ranked season statistics for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player ranked season statistics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve ranked-only season statistics for a specific player in a given season. Returns ranked game mode metrics including rank tier, rank points, kills, wins, and other ranked-specific performance data. Excludes casual mode statistics.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack clarity on what distinguishes ranked stats from general season stats. Added explicit mention that this returns ranked-only data, excludes casual modes, and includes rank tier/points information to clarify the distinction and help AI agents choose the correct endpoint.

message: Operation 'getPlayerLifetimeStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description lack context about scope (all-time, all seasons). Added clarification that this is cumulative across all seasons, includes all game modes, and represents career-wide data to help AI agents understand when to use this versus season-specific endpoints.

data.current_description: Retrieve lifetime statistics for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player lifetime career statistics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve cumulative lifetime statistics for a specific player across all seasons. Returns aggregated game mode statistics (solo, duo, squad) including total kills, deaths, wins, matches played, and other career-wide performance metrics. Represents the player's all-time performance data.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack context about scope (all-time, all seasons). Added clarification that this is cumulative across all seasons, includes all game modes, and represents career-wide data to help AI agents understand when to use this versus season-specific endpoints.

message: Operation 'getBatchSeasonStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (player IDs list, game mode parameter) and output structure. Added details about input parameters, batch limit, game mode requirement, and return data structure to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this endpoint.

data.current_description: Retrieve season statistics for multiple players at once (batch up to 10).
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve season statistics for multiple players
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve season statistics for multiple players in a specific game mode and season in a single batch request. Supports up to 10 players per request. Requires player IDs, season ID, and game mode (solo/duo/squad) as input. Returns season statistics for each player including kills, wins, top 10 finishes, and other game mode-specific metrics.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (player IDs list, game mode parameter) and output structure. Added details about input parameters, batch limit, game mode requirement, and return data structure to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this endpoint.

Operation 'getSamples' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too minimal and doesn't explain the purpose or use case for sample matches. Added context about what samples are used for (telemetry exploration), clarified the return format (array of IDs), and explained the operational value (discovering matches without player context). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus player-specific match queries.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of sample match IDs.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve sample match IDs for exploration
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of recent sample match IDs available for telemetry data retrieval. Returns an array of match IDs that can be used to access match telemetry and detailed match information. Useful for discovering recent matches without requiring a specific player context.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and doesn't explain the purpose or use case for sample matches. Added context about what samples are used for (telemetry exploration), clarified the return format (array of IDs), and explained the operational value (discovering matches without player context). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus player-specific match queries.

message: Operation 'getWeaponMastery' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about what weapon mastery data contains and what the response includes. Added clarity about mastery levels, weapon types, and proficiency tracking. Specified required parameters (player ID and platform) to help AI agents understand prerequisites. Enhanced domain terminology consistency with 'mastery progression' and 'proficiency'.

data.current_description: Retrieve weapon mastery data for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player weapon mastery progression
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve weapon mastery progression data for a specific player, including mastery levels and statistics for each weapon type. Returns detailed weapon mastery information showing player proficiency across different weapons. Requires the player ID and platform shard.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what weapon mastery data contains and what the response includes. Added clarity about mastery levels, weapon types, and proficiency tracking. Specified required parameters (player ID and platform) to help AI agents understand prerequisites. Enhanced domain terminology consistency with 'mastery progression' and 'proficiency'.

message: Operation 'getLeaderboard' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks detail about leaderboard content, ranking criteria, and pagination support. Added clarity about what data is returned (player rankings, ratings, statistics), specified all required parameters (season ID, game mode, platform), and mentioned pagination support. Enhanced domain terminology with 'ranked leaderboard', 'competitive rating', and 'game mode'. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and how to use pagination.

data.current_description: Retrieve the leaderboard for a specific season and game mode.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve ranked leaderboard for season and mode
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the ranked leaderboard for a specific season and game mode, showing top-ranked players with their ratings and statistics. Returns a paginated list of players ranked by their competitive rating for the specified season and game mode. Requires season ID, game mode, and platform shard. Supports pagination parameters.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about leaderboard content, ranking criteria, and pagination support. Added clarity about what data is returned (player rankings, ratings, statistics), specified all required parameters (season ID, game mode, platform), and mentioned pagination support. Enhanced domain terminology with 'ranked leaderboard', 'competitive rating', and 'game mode'. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and how to use pagination.

message: Operation 'getPlayers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (filter parameter), output structure, and how to specify search criteria. Added details about batch limit, return data structure, and parameter usage for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Search for players by name or ID. Supports batch lookups of up to 10 players.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for players by name or ID
data.description_suggestion: Search for one or more players by player name or account ID. Supports batch lookups of up to 10 players per request. Returns player profile data including account ID, name, and platform information for each matched player. Use the filter parameter to specify search criteria (name or ID).
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (filter parameter), output structure, and how to specify search criteria. Added details about batch limit, return data structure, and parameter usage for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getSeasons' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks information about what season data is returned and the purpose of this operation in the context of other stat queries. Enhanced to clarify return structure and use case.

data.current_description: Retrieve the list of available seasons for a platform.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve available seasons for platform
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the list of all available seasons for the specified platform. Returns season metadata including season ID, name, and status (active/inactive). Use this to identify valid season IDs for season-specific stat queries.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks information about what season data is returned and the purpose of this operation in the context of other stat queries. Enhanced to clarify return structure and use case.

message: Operation 'getPlayerSeasonStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary lacks specificity about what 'stats' means. Description is too vague about what statistics are returned. Added context about game modes, specific metrics returned, and clarification that both ranked and casual data are included to help AI agents understand the response structure.

data.current_description: Retrieve season statistics for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player statistics for specific season
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve comprehensive season statistics for a specific player in a given season. Returns game mode statistics (solo, duo, squad) including kills, deaths, wins, top 10 finishes, and other performance metrics. Includes both ranked and casual mode data for the specified season.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about what 'stats' means. Description is too vague about what statistics are returned. Added context about game modes, specific metrics returned, and clarification that both ranked and casual data are included to help AI agents understand the response structure.

message: Operation 'getPlayerRankedStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description lack clarity on what distinguishes ranked stats from general season stats. Added explicit mention that this returns ranked-only data, excludes casual modes, and includes rank tier/points information to clarify the distinction and help AI agents choose the correct endpoint.

data.current_description: Retrieve ranked season statistics for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player ranked season statistics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve ranked-only season statistics for a specific player in a given season. Returns ranked game mode metrics including rank tier, rank points, kills, wins, and other ranked-specific performance data. Excludes casual mode statistics.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack clarity on what distinguishes ranked stats from general season stats. Added explicit mention that this returns ranked-only data, excludes casual modes, and includes rank tier/points information to clarify the distinction and help AI agents choose the correct endpoint.

message: Operation 'getPlayerLifetimeStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description lack context about scope (all-time, all seasons). Added clarification that this is cumulative across all seasons, includes all game modes, and represents career-wide data to help AI agents understand when to use this versus season-specific endpoints.

data.current_description: Retrieve lifetime statistics for a specific player.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve player lifetime career statistics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve cumulative lifetime statistics for a specific player across all seasons. Returns aggregated game mode statistics (solo, duo, squad) including total kills, deaths, wins, matches played, and other career-wide performance metrics. Represents the player's all-time performance data.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack context about scope (all-time, all seasons). Added clarification that this is cumulative across all seasons, includes all game modes, and represents career-wide data to help AI agents understand when to use this versus season-specific endpoints.

data.current_description: Retrieve season statistics for multiple players at once (batch up to 10).
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve season statistics for multiple players
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve season statistics for multiple players in a specific game mode and season in a single batch request. Supports up to 10 players per request. Requires player IDs, season ID, and game mode (solo/duo/squad) as input. Returns season statistics for each player including kills, wins, top 10 finishes, and other game mode-specific metrics.
